notes: Section 1961c, , , , related to cooperation of Federal, State and private agencies with Secretary of the Interior who was directed to make information on relevant projects available. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title III, § 30078 Stat. 332section 7877(a) of this titleJuly 17, 1964

Section 1961c–1, , , , related to lack of authority of Secretary of the Interior over water resources research of other Federal agencies and lack of effect that this chapter had on existing authorities and responsibilities of Federal agencies. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title III, § 30178 Stat. 332section 7881 of this titleJuly 17, 1964

See .Pub. L. 88–379, title III, § 30378 Stat. 332section 7879 of this titleJuly 17, 1964
Section 1961c–4, , , , established a cataloging center. See .Pub. L. 88–379, title III, § 30478 Stat. 332section 7853 of this titleJuly 17, 1964
